ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Current performance rating of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "opponent_rating" REAL /* Rating of the opponent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the opponent's logo */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Current performance rating of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "vs_avg_game_score" REAL /* Difference between the actual and average game scores */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, tournament) */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the summary belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "opponent_rating" REAL /* Rating of the opponent */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "vs_avg_game_score" REAL /* Difference between the actual and average game scores */,
  "detailed_events" TEXT /* Detailed events of the game (e.g., play-by-play, key moments) */,
  "highlight_reel_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's highlight reel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "pitching_hand" TEXT /* Pitching hand of the player */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Current performance rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., runs, hits, strikeouts) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "specific_game_condition" TEXT /* Specific game condition (e.g., day/night, home/away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player contribution */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contribution belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the contribution belongs to */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., runs scored, runs batted in) */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  "clutch_hits" INTEGER /* Number of clutch hits by the player */,
  "defensive_plays" INTEGER /* Number of defensive plays made by the player */,
  "impact_on_outcome" TEXT /* Impact on the game's outcome (e.g., decisive, minimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contributions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contributions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., single elimination, round-robin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_games" (
  "tournament_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the game in the tournament (e.g., quarterfinal, semifinal, final) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the league belongs to */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the league */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data export) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
